_comment: Template documenting the JSON Claude returns from /ml-review (introduced 2026-05-26). Covers trainer-VM service health, every model in the registry, promotion/demotion recommendations against the 7-stage ladder, and forward-looking experiment proposals. This skill never edits ml/configs/ — proposals only. This file is documentation, not a validated JSON Schema.

trainer_models.note: per-model roll-up; concern only when an advisory+/live model degrades on live/shadow data

model_status._comment: REQUIRED — one entry per model in `python -m ml list-models`. The standing answer to 'how is each model doing'. [] only when the trainer relay errored (then trainer_findings.trainer_models = skip).
model_status.stage: research_only | candidate | backtest_approved | shadow | advisory | limited_live | live_approved

live_shadow.score_summary: score distribution / mean when predictions>0, else 'no predictions yet'
live_shadow.realized: win-rate / PnL of closed trades this model scored, when joinable; else 'n/a'

model_status.note: <= 160 chars — one-line health verdict for this model

promotion_recommendations._comment: Tier-3 stage moves. The shadow->advisory step is THE live-trading gate; advisory->limited_live->live_approved are the same Tier-3 gate, more cautiously evidenced. Demotions are also Tier-3 (less risky but still operator-decided).
promotion_recommendations.evidence: <= 240 chars — N predictions, win-rate on joined trades, drift verdict, training trend
promotion_recommendations.risk_note: <= 160 chars — what to watch after applying, kill-switch path

experiments_proposed._comment: Forward-looking ML coverage expansion. Each proposal is an idea the operator can convert to a manifest / feature / dataset / target / sweep.
experiments_proposed.name: <short slug>
experiments_proposed.expected_metric_signal: <what would convince us this is worth shadowing>
experiments_proposed.next_step: PR a new ml/configs/<name>.yaml | extend ml/features/... | new dataset family in src/ml/datasets/...

backlog_drain._comment: Result of draining docs/claude/ml-review-backlog.json this run. action: fixed | deferred | invalid.

anomalies: free-form list of notable items (datasets failing, runs erroring, predictions silently dropping, etc.)

claude_channel_ping._comment: The one-line update posted to @claude_ict_comms_bot via the send-ping system-action.
